changes: Align the packaged Joystick Scroller DLL with the deterministic player package seam by staging it under Custom/Scripts inside the .var while keeping loose Custom/Plugins testing as a separate live path.
Block mixed live deploy runs that would both distribute a .var to AddonPackages and copy a loose scroller DLL into VaM Custom during the same build.
Advance the package-first dev test lane to FrameAngel.JoystickScrollerDev.5.var and keep the generated catalog identity aligned with that package rung.
